name: Cold Pumpkin Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over water to soften.
2. Heat over low heat until gelatin is dissolved.
3. Beat eggs thoroughly in a bowl.
4. Gradually add sugar and continue to beat until the mixture is smooth and very thick.
5. Stir in pumpkin, rum, cinnamon, ginger, mace, and cloves.
6. Blend in gelatin well and fold in whipped cream.
7. Line the bottom of a 6-inch round dish with foil, oiled side down. Place around the outside edges of the oiled dish, oiled side in.
8. Fill the dish with pumpkin mixture and chill until set.
9. Carefully remove foil collar.
10. Decorate the top of the souffle with candied kumquats, if desired.
11. Optionally, dip the fluted mold in hot water for a few seconds and turn out onto a serving platter. Serve with additional whipped cream, if desired.
